pages.title: Monster Truck Crush

The physics-based driving mechanic challenges players to master momentum and vehicle control in off-road environments.

• Physics-based truck handling  
• Obstacle destruction challenges  
• Progressive terrain difficulty  
• Time attack scoring mode  
• Off-road monster truck setting
